# MythOS

> MythOS is the operating system for local economies: software, hardware, and payments that help local businesses compete with Big Tech instead of paying it. The company's rallying cry is "The Fight for Local."

MythOS builds infrastructure that gives small businesses the same visibility, automation, and AI tools that national chains spend millions on. The mission is circulation, not extraction: keeping money, attention, and opportunity inside local neighborhoods. The company is launching in Dallas / Fort Worth and San Diego in 2026.

## Products
- **MythOS Pro**: an AI-powered business operating system for local businesses, featuring Mylo, an AI assistant that handles reception, booking, customer service, and operations.
- **The Network**: a free hyperlocal discovery app that surfaces the best local businesses by proximity, quality, and community, not by who paid the most for ad placement. Customers earn Rebel Points and can spend Myth Credits at local businesses.
- **Smart Mirror**: a hardware product that turns barbershop and salon mirrors into a consultation, transaction, and entertainment surface powered by Mylo.

## Key pages
- [Manifesto](https://mythosrebellion.com/manifesto): why MythOS exists. Big Tech owns local distribution and rents it back to chains; MythOS is building the infrastructure to take it back.
- [For Businesses](https://mythosrebellion.com/for-businesses): MythOS Pro for local business owners.
- [Products](https://mythosrebellion.com/products): the full MythOS product lineup.
- [Events](https://mythosrebellion.com/events): MythOS hosts in-person events, headlined by Fight for Local, a championship fight night in Dallas / Fort Worth that pairs pro fights with a community hackathon.
- [Become a Partner](https://mythosrebellion.com/partner): for business improvement districts, chambers of commerce, small businesses, creators, and people who want to join the team.
- [For Investors](https://mythosrebellion.com/investors): the MythOS investment story.

## Facts
- Cities: Dallas / Fort Worth and San Diego (launching 2026).
- Contact: hello@mythosrebellion.com
- Social: x.com/mythosrebellion, instagram.com/mythosrebellion, linkedin.com/company/mythos-systems-inc
- Notable research: the Big Tech Tax Report, which found local businesses in two metros paid roughly $1.451B to Big Tech in a single year just to be seen in their own neighborhoods.
